name: Chladni Plate
primary_sources: Entdeckungen über die Theorie des Klanges

distinctive_features: nodal lines where no vibration occurs
sand or powder forming patterns along nodal lines
visual_attributes.texture: smooth metallic surface with granular sand
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: sand arranges itself along nodal lines on the plate

domain_specific_functional.ACOUSTIC_DEMONSTRATION: used to show sound wave patterns

relationships.description: Chladni invented the technique to visualize vibration patterns.
Chladni's work was inspired by Hooke's earlier experiments with nodal patterns.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: pioneering work in acoustics and visualization of sound
primary_sources: Entdeckungen über die Theorie des Klanges

contrastive_constraints: NOT a generic metal plate without patterns
NOT a modern digital visualization tool
